productDisplayName: Nike Men As Sideline J Blue Jackets
description: CompositionRoyal blue jacket made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has long raglan sleeves with elasticated cuffs, black piping on the shoulder seam on the front, mock neck with zippered closure on the front, insert pockets on the sides with zippered closures, black panels on the sides, vented seam on the upper back, embroidered logos on the upper left chest and back, mesh lining and doggle strap on the hemline FittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryEnjoy the winter in style in this Dri-fit jacket from nike. The simple style is complemented by bold black panelling on the sides, while the fabric wicks sweat away, keeping you dry and comfortable all day. Team this with long sleeved tees, jeans or tracks and sports shoes.
